channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-Orioles pitcher Brian Matusz dead at 37
item.description: Former Baltimore Orioles pitcher Brian Matusz, a former starter who moved into the bullpen, has died at the age of 37, the team announced on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Detroit Lions star Kerby Joseph deserves to win Defensive Player of the Year award
item.description: Detroit Lions star free safety Kerby Joseph finished the season as the king of interceptions with nine while helping his team finish tied with the best record in the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Jerry Jones' tear-jerking Cowboys monologue during 'Landman' cameo goes viral
item.description: Jerry Jones delivered a monologue during a cameo appearance in the Paramount+ show "Landman" that had many believing he was not acting when he discussed why he bought the Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-NFL reporter Michele Tafoya rips Mark Zuckerberg over damage done in wake of Meta's fact-checking programs
item.description: Former NFL sideline reporter Michele Tafoya appeared on OutKick's "Don't @ Me with Dan Dakich" to talk Mark Zuckerberg's about-face on fact-checking programs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz lose on half-court shot at the buzzer
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz' attempt at its first three-game winning streak of the season ended in heartbreaking fashion. Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies avoid upset at San Jose State, 85-78
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - In their first game of the season as a ranked team, the Utah State basketball team avoided a major upset at San Jose State Tuesday night. Mason Falslev had 17 points and seven rebounds, Tucker Anderson added 15 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sharks start slow as ugly streak against Golden Knights continues
item.description: San Jose Sharks fall behind by two goals to Vegas Golden Knights on two occasions and never fully recover in a 4-2 loss at SAP Center.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Trae Young's 49-foot buzzer-beater lifts Hawks to a 124-121 win over the Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Indoor golf league created by Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy has a loud, swift debut match
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Ludvig Aberg will be the answer to a trivia question: He made the first birdie in TGL history. And with that, the indoor golf competition that Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy had envisioned for years was finally underway.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ready for takeoff: Duke star Cooper Flagg puts highlight-dunk signature on Pittsburgh win
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Cooper Flagg was still simmering, angry at himself, for picking up his third foul so early in the second half before knocking away an entry pass to force a turnover.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No more unbeatens: No. 8 Florida topples top-ranked Tennessee 73-43 with stifling defense
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Alijah Martin scored 18 points, Denzel Aberdeen added 16 and No. 8 Florida thumped top-ranked Tennessee 73-43 on Tuesday night to knock off the last unbeaten team in Division I basketball.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lakers coach JJ Redick says his family evacuated and people are 'freaking out' due to LA wildfires
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Los Angeles Lakers coach JJ Redick said members of his family were among those in Southern California forced to evacuate their homes on Tuesday due to a wildfire that was being whipped by strong winds around Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: STEFAN STEVENSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The 49ers fire special teams coordinator Brian Schneider, AP source says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers fired special teams coach Brian Schneider following a season when repeated blunders in the kicking contributed to a losing season, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Zac Blair tries to regain PGA Tour status
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The first full field event of the season on the PGA Tour, the Hawaiian Open, tees off on Thursday. Former BYU star Zac Blair flew out to Hawaii to try to Monday qualify because he no longer has full status on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Bears seek permission to interview Cowboys' Mike McCarthy for head coaching vacancy
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears have sought permission to interview Dallas Cowboys head coach Mike McCarthy and are awaiting a response from the Cowboys, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers secure playoff win: Fans celebrate victory
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — With the Bucs clinching a playoff spot, fans are fired up as they look ahead to the next steps in their postseason journey. It was a rough start for fans cheering on the Tampa Bay Buccaneers against the New Orleans Saints on the opening drives.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Broncos clinch playoffs after 38-0 win over Chiefs
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — They say, "It ain't how you start; it's how you finish." For the Denver Broncos, their season finale had it all—high stakes, playoff hopes, and a shot at redemption against a Kansas City Chiefs team resting most of its stars.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Lions secure NFC's No. 1 seed, Broncos and Buccaneers clinch the NFL's final two playoff spots
item.description: The road to the Super Bowl in the NFC will go through Motown. The Detroit Lions secured a No. 1 seed with a 31-9 victory over the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mariota leads playoff-bound Commanders to 23-19 win over Cowboys after replacing Daniels
item.description: Marcus Mariota threw a 5-yard touchdown pass to Terry McLaurin with 3 seconds left, lifting Washington to a 23-19 victory over the Dallas Cowboys on Sunday and clinching the sixth seed in the NFC playoffs for the Commanders.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Browns fire offensive coordinator Ken Dorsey and O-line coach Andy Dickerson after 3-14 season
item.description: Hours after finishing 3-14 with a loss in the finale of a season that was expected to carry into the playoffs, Cleveland coach Kevin Stefanski fired offensive coordinator Ken Dorsey and offensive line coach Andy Dickerson.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, matchups and what to know for the 2024 season finale
item.description: UPDATE: The Bears and Packers have announced their inactives for Sunday's game. See below. GREEN BAY, Wis. — A long, trying 2024 season for the Bears reaches its merciful conclusion Sunday afternoon at Lambeau Field.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Dallas, 3-2
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Thomas Harley scored 3:01 into overtime to give the Dallas Stars their fourth straight win, 3-2 against the Utah Hockey Club at American Airlines Center on Saturday. Matt Duchene found Harley near the right post after collecting his own rebound in front of the net.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes get run over by Texas Tech, 93-65
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It may be a long first season in the Big 12 Conference for the Utes basketball team. Darrion Williams scored 19 points with nine assists, Federiko Federiko added 14 points on 7-of-9 shooting — including five dunks — on Saturday, and Texas Tech beat Utah 93-65.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks cruise past Utah State in season opener
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The fifth-ranked Utah gymnastics team kicked off its 50th anniversary season in style, overcoming a slow start to eventually secure a dominant victory over Utah State Friday night at the Huntsman Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Heat suspend Jimmy Butler for 7 games and will seek to trade him
item.description: Jimmy Butler was Miami's best player for five years, the leader of a team that went to the NBA Finals twice in his tenure. He talked big and, at times, played bigger. He spoke with reverence for the city, for the franchise, for the famed “Heat Culture.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: CMU Women's wrestling thrives under Coach Mercado's leadership
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa University women’s wrestling coach Travis Mercado expressed gratitude for his team’s commitment and drive to succeed. “I’m just grateful to have a group of young ladies that I trust and who trust me,” Mercado said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
